POST /api/auth/login.description: Exchange credentials for a session token + API key.

GET /api/auth/me.description: Return the currently authenticated user profile.

GET /api/suppliers.description: List suppliers with pagination and optional search.

GET /api/suppliers/:id.description: Fetch a single supplier by id.

GET /api/invoices.description: List invoices with filters (supplier, status, date range).

POST /api/invoices.description: Create a new invoice for an existing supplier.

GET /api/invoices/:id.description: Fetch a single invoice by id, including line items.

POST /api/payroll/runs.description: Create a new payroll run for a period.

GET /api/payroll/wage-slip/:employee_id.description: Fetch the most recent wage slip for an employee.

POST /api/vat/report.description: Generate a VAT 874/PCN836 report for a given period.

POST /api/bank/statements/upload.description: Upload a bank statement file for ingestion and matching.

GET /api/annual-tax/:year.description: Fetch the latest annual tax report for a given year.
